title: Indian Shuttlers Must Learn to Win Without Constant Coach Presence
indian_angle: This article discusses the critical need for Indian badminton players to develop independent decision-making skills on court, especially when coaches are not present.
summary: An opinion piece highlighting the importance of Indian shuttlers developing self-reliance and tactical independence during matches, rather than solely relying on courtside coaching.

title: New 3x15 Scoring System to Debut in Domestic Tournaments
indian_angle: This major policy change by BAI directly impacts how domestic tournaments and national championships for junior categories will be played in India.
summary: The Badminton Association of India (BAI) is implementing a new 3x15 scoring system for all domestic ranking tournaments and national championships for U-13, U-15, and U-17 categories, starting with a debut in Ernakulam.

title: Kidambi Srikanth Finishes Runner-Up at US Open
indian_angle: Indian shuttler Kidambi Srikanth made a strong run to the final of the US Open, showcasing his competitive form on the international stage.
summary: Kidambi Srikanth reached the final of the US Open before falling short against Su Li Yang, finishing as the runner-up in a commendable performance at the Super 300 event.

title: Rounak Chouhan Upsets World No. 6 Chou Tien Chen at US Open
indian_angle: Young Indian shuttler Rounak Chouhan delivered a significant upset by defeating a top-ranked international player at the US Open.
summary: Rounak Chouhan, a self-professed Cristiano Ronaldo fan, caused a stir at the US Open Super 300 by defeating World No. 6 Chou Tien Chen, marking a major victory for the Indian shuttler.

title: Selection Tournament Announced for Asia U17 & U15 Junior Championships
indian_angle: This announcement details the selection process for young Indian talents to represent the country at the upcoming Badminton Asia Junior Championships.
summary: The Badminton Association of India has released details for the selection tournament to pick the Indian squad for the Badminton Asia U17 & U15 Junior Championships 2026.

title: Grassroot Coaches Development Programs in Guwahati and Raipur
indian_angle: This circular outlines initiatives to develop coaching talent at the grassroots level in India, crucial for nurturing future badminton stars.
summary: BAI has issued a circular for a Coaches Development Program focusing on the grassroot level, scheduled to take place at NCE Guwahati and Raipur from July 15th to 24th, 2026.
